The computer is requesting voice print identification from Captain Picard.
Lieutenant Commander Data is in the Ready room, instructing the computer to access Starfleet Command orders.
userQuery: Computer, this is Lieutenant Commander Data. Please access all Starfleet Command orders to starships, starbases and colonies for the past six months.

situationalContext: Lieutenant Commander Data is reacting to information, and the computer misinterprets his statement as an unclear request.

computerReply: Thank you, sir. I comprehend. Please specify how you would like to proceed, sir.
situationalContext: Lieutenant Commander Data is explaining to the computer that his previous statement was not a request.
